skills.name: yandex-id
skills.title: Yandex ID
skills.description: Call Yandex ID (login.info/email/avatar) via Nango proxy after OAuth connect
skills.when: User asks about Yandex profile, login, email, avatar, or account identity.
skills.notes: Legacy Nango unique key `yandex` still works if that is what was connected.

operations.title: GET profile
operations.verification: Return only the confirmed profile response.

operations.title: legacy key
operations.verification: Return only the confirmed profile response for the explicitly selected legacy connection key.

skills.name: yandex-disk
skills.title: Yandex Disk
skills.description: Call Yandex Disk REST API via Nango proxy after OAuth connect
skills.when: User asks to list/upload/download files on Yandex Disk.

operations.title: Disk meta
operations.verification: Return only the confirmed disk metadata response.

operations.title: List root
operations.verification: Return bounded resource pages and the pagination termination reason.

operations.title: Upload file
operations.verification: After transfer success, read v1/disk/resources for disk:/report.csv and compare remote path and size; compare checksum only when the provider response includes one.

operations.title: Download file
operations.verification: Require the confirmed transfer size and sha256, then verify the final local file inside the configured download root.

skills.name: yandex-mail
skills.title: Yandex Mail
skills.description: Use Yandex Mail OAuth token (IMAP/SMTP XOAUTH2) obtained via Nango
skills.when: User asks to read or send Yandex Mail.
skills.notes: The Python fallback resolves identity only. Mailbox reads and sends use registered Nango actions backed by the fixed IMAP/SMTP bridge; never expose the OAuth token.

operations.title: Resolve mailbox email
operations.verification: Return only the confirmed mailbox address from the registered action.

operations.title: List messages

pagination.continuation: Use numeric nextCursor as beforeUid; stop on a non-positive or non-numeric cursor.

operations.verification: Return bounded message metadata. Continue only with a numeric nextCursor converted to beforeUid, and report the caller-side item bound.

operations.title: Get message
operations.verification: Return only the confirmed message for the requested folder and UID.

operations.title: Send message with attachment
operations.verification: On confirmed success require mailbox and Message-ID. On unknown, keep the same idempotency key and do not retry until provider mailbox state is checked externally; current read actions cannot search exact Message-ID.

skills.name: yandex-calendar
skills.title: Yandex Calendar
skills.description: Call Yandex Calendar CalDAV API via Nango proxy after OAuth connect
skills.when: User asks about Yandex Calendar events, availability, or meetings.
skills.notes: CalDAV (ICS), not Google Calendar JSON API.

operations.title: CalDAV root
operations.verification: Return one bounded raw-XML response and the byte/page termination reason. Do not treat maxItems as a calendar count or infer collection paths from undocumented shapes.

operations.title: Query events (replace documented CalDAV fields)
operations.verification: Before execution replace the collection, Depth, and XML with documented values including a bounded time range. Return one raw-XML response; maxItems does not count events.

operations.title: Create event resource (replace documented CalDAV fields)
operations.verification: After success or unknown, GET the same event path and compare the body and safe ETag. Without an ETag, report verification as incomplete.

skills.name: yandex-direct
skills.title: Yandex Direct
skills.description: Call Yandex Direct API via Nango proxy after OAuth connect
skills.when: User asks about Yandex Direct campaigns, ads, or reports.
skills.notes: Nango injects the provider credential. The caller must not supply or override auth and Nango control headers. After a confirmed Direct mutation, read the campaign and compare intended fields; after an uncertain dispatch, inspect campaign state before retrying.

operations.title: JSON v5 campaigns
operations.verification: Advance Page.Offset within configured bounds and return the terminal page and termination reason.

operations.title: Update campaign (replace provider-documented payload)
operations.verification: After confirmed success read the campaign and compare intended fields. After unknown, inspect campaign state before any retry.

skills.name: yandex-maps
skills.title: Yandex Maps
skills.description: Call Yandex Maps (bookmarks scope) via Nango proxy after OAuth connect
skills.when: User asks about Yandex Maps bookmarks / saved places (msps:public_bookmarks).
skills.base: No verified public bookmarks REST base
skills.notes: No public bookmarks route is confirmed. Keep generic HTTP capability available for an operator-supplied documented product endpoint, but never invent a path or schema.

operations.title: Legacy placeholder — do not execute without a documented path
operations.verification: Do not invent a host, path, schema, or pagination contract; report that no supported public-bookmarks route is confirmed.

skills.name: yandex-market
skills.title: Yandex Market Partner
skills.description: Call Yandex Market Partner API via Nango proxy after OAuth connect
skills.when: User asks about Market partner campaigns, offers, or partner cabinet data.
skills.notes: Authentication behavior depends on the configured Nango provider and has not been live-verified by this repository.

operations.title: Campaigns v2
operations.verification: Return bounded campaign pages and the pagination termination reason; do not claim the provider authentication was live-tested.

skills.name: yandex-delivery
skills.title: Yandex Delivery Partner
skills.description: Call Yandex Delivery Partner API via Nango proxy after OAuth connect
skills.when: User asks about Yandex Delivery offers, claims, or partner logistics API.
skills.notes: The create route requires the exact matching Delivery product schema. Never send an empty create body as a connectivity test.

operations.title: Legacy create shape — do not execute without real required fields
operations.verification: Do not execute until the exact product body schema, created-entity read path, and unknown-outcome reconciliation route are verified.

skills.name: bitrix24
skills.title: Bitrix24
skills.description: Call Bitrix24 REST (base user scope) via Nango proxy after OAuth connect
skills.when: User asks generic Bitrix24 requests; prefer module skills (crm/tasks/…) when available.
skills.notes: Connect requires Bitrix24 portal domain. Install module-specific skills when those integrations are connected.

operations.title: Current user
operations.verification: Return only the confirmed current-user response.

skills.name: bitrix24-crm
skills.title: Bitrix24 CRM
skills.description: Call Bitrix24 CRM REST (leads, deals, contacts) via Nango proxy
skills.when: User asks about Bitrix24 leads, deals, contacts, companies, invoices, SPA.
skills.notes: Requires OAuth connection for provider_config_key bitrix24-crm. Primary deal updates use nango_proxy_request with crm.deal.update; after confirmed success, read the deal with crm.deal.get, and after an uncertain dispatch inspect it before retrying.

operations.title: List leads
operations.verification: Return bounded pages and the pagination termination reason; stop at provider end or configured bounds.

operations.title: List deals
operations.verification: Return bounded pages and the pagination termination reason; stop at provider end or configured bounds.

operations.title: Update deal
operations.verification: After confirmed success read the deal through crm.deal.get and compare intended fields. After unknown, inspect the same deal before any retry.

skills.name: amocrm

skills.scopes: account data (coarse OAuth scopes in amoМаркет)

operations.title: Account
operations.verification: Return only the confirmed account response.

skills.name: amocrm-chats
skills.title: amoCRM Chats
skills.description: Call amoCRM chats / messaging integrations via Nango proxy
skills.when: User asks about amoCRM chats, messengers, inbound channels.
skills.notes: Read Talks through `api/v4/talks`. Send outbound messages through the registered `nango_action` `send-message` action with `providerConfigKey` `amocrm-chats`; confirm the returned message id and inspect chat state before retrying an unknown outcome.

operations.title: Talks
operations.verification: Return bounded pages and the pagination termination reason; stop at provider end or configured bounds.

operations.title: Send message
operations.verification: On confirmed success require result.refId to equal the input msgid and retain the provider msgid. On unknown, do not retry blindly: the registered talks read cannot prove delivery of the exact message.
